---
title: "Publications"
---

<!-- Written by hand and grouped by year.
     Future upgrade: Quarto supports generating this page from a .bib file
     using the `bibliography` and `nocite` YAML keys — see
     https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/citations.html -->

## 2025

- **Your Name**, A. Coauthor, B. Coauthor. *A paper title that sounds important*. Journal of Interesting Things, 2025. [[PDF](#)] [[code](#)] [[doi](#)]

- A. Coauthor\*, **Your Name**\*. *Another paper title*. Proceedings of Somewhere, 2025. [[PDF](#)] [[doi](#)]

## 2024

- **Your Name**, C. Coauthor. *An earlier paper*. Journal of Other Things, 2024. [[PDF](#)] [[doi](#)]

## Preprints & working papers

- **Your Name**. *A preprint that is definitely almost ready*. 2025. [[PDF](#)]
